scripts.skills:setup: [ -d contents ] || (git clone git@github.com:cardstack/boxel-skills.git contents || git clone https://github.com/cardstack/boxel-skills.git contents) && pnpm skills:migrate-refs
scripts.skills:update: pnpm skills:setup && cd contents && git pull && cd .. && pnpm skills:migrate-refs
scripts.skills:migrate-refs: find contents -name '*.json' -exec sed -i '' 's|https://cardstack.com/base/|@cardstack/base/|g' {} + && find contents -name '*.json' -exec sed -i '' 's|https://app.boxel.ai/catalog/|@cardstack/catalog/|g' {} +
